column1: ## (1) tuId. Transcription Unit identifier assigned by RegulonDB
## (3) operonId. Operon id containing the transcription uni
## (4) operonName. Operon name containing the transcription unit
## (5) tuGenesIds. Ids of the gene(s) contained in the transcription unit
## (6) tuGenesNames. Names of the gene(s) contained in the transcription unit
## (9) promoterPos. Transcription start site of promoter(10) terminatorIds. Ids of the terminators associated to transcription unit
##(12) tfsIds. transcription Factors ids that regulates the transcription Unit
##(13) tfsNames. transcription Factors names that regulates the transcription Unit
##(14) tuGenesBnumber. bnumbers of the tu genes
##(15) firstGenePos. start position of the first tu gene
##(16) lastGenePos. end position of the first tu gene
##(18) DBXRef. id of the TU in Ecocyc
